item.title: 尽管存在战争通胀风险，经济学家仍预测美联储将于六月降息
item.description: 路透社调查的经济学家预计，美国联邦储备委员会将于6月首次下调利率。尽管美以对伊战争可能扰乱能源市场，推高本已居高不下的通胀率，但这些经济学家仍坚持此前的预测。【原文：The U.S. Federal Reserve will cut interest rates for the first time this year in June, according to economists polled by Reuters who are clinging to their views despite the risk that disruption of energy markets resulting from the ​U.S.-Israeli war on Iran boosts already-elevated inflation.】

item.title: 美国1月贸易赤字收窄，出口跃升至历史新高
item.description: 美国1月份贸易赤字大幅收窄，出口激增至历史新高，而进口则出现下滑。若这一趋势得以延续，贸易将在第一季度为经济增长作出贡献。【原文：The U.S. trade deficit narrowed sharply in January as exports surged to a record high and imports fell, a trend that if sustained, could see trade contributing to economic growth in the first ​quarter.】

item.title: 私募信贷基金因投资者抛售而下跌
item.description: 由KKR和蓝猫等大型金融机构运营的投资基金，其股价在最近几周持续下跌，投资者对这些基金所发放贷款的质量产生了质疑。【原文：Investment funds run by big financial firms such as KKR and Blue Owl have seen ​their stock prices slide in recent weeks as investors question the quality of the loans the funds have made.】

item.title: 美国1月份独栋住宅开工量下降
item.description: 受严冬天气影响，美国1月份独栋住宅开工量下滑，且未来建筑许可数量下降，表明强劲反弹的可能性不大。【原文：U.S. single-family homebuilding fell in January amid harsh winter weather, and a strong rebound is unlikely, with permits for future construction declining.】

item.title: 达美航空将纽约至特拉维夫航班的暂停期延长至本月底
item.description: 达美航空周四表示，将暂停纽约至特拉维夫航线的服务直至本月底。【原文：Delta Air ​Lines said on Thursday it ‌was extending the pause on its New York-Tel Aviv service till the ​end of the month.】

item.title: 五角大楼首席技术官称重启与Anthropic谈判"毫无可能"
item.description: 五角大楼首席技术官埃米尔·迈克尔周四宣布，在与Anthropic公司就美军使用其技术限制的争议中，该机构将这家人工智能实验室列为供应链风险后，已排除与Anthropic进行谈判的可能性。【原文：Pentagon Chief Technology Officer Emil Michael on Thursday ruled out negotiations with Anthropic ​after the agency labeled the AI lab a ‌supply-chain risk in a dispute over restrictions on how the U.S. military can use its technology.】

item.title: 美国每周初请失业金人数小幅下降
item.description: 上周美国初请失业金人数有所下降，这可能有助于缓解市场对劳动力市场恶化的担忧——此前2月份就业人数意外下滑。【原文：The number of Americans filing new applications for jobless benefits fell last week, which could help to assuage fears of a labor market deterioration after an unexpected decline ​in employment in February.】

item.title: 迪克体育用品公司预测全年销售额将超预期，因需求持续稳定
item.description: 迪克体育用品公司周四预测其全年销售额将超出华尔街预期，此前该公司季度业绩已超出市场预期。该公司押注其运动鞋服产品需求将保持强劲。【原文：Dick's Sporting Goods on Thursday forecast its annual sales above Wall Street expectations after topping quarterly estimates, betting on resilient ​demand for the retailer's athletic footwear and apparel.】

item.title: 美国能源部长称油价不太可能突破每桶200美元
item.description: 美国能源部长克里斯·赖特周四表示，尽管原油油轮仍在霍尔木兹海峡受困，且美国与以色列对伊朗的战争范围扩大，但全球油价不太可能突破每桶200美元。【原文：U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright said ​on Thursday global oil prices are unlikely to hit $200 a ‌barrel even as crude tankers remained stalled in the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. and Israeli war with Iran widened.】

item.title: 英国劳埃德银行因客户可查看他人交易记录致歉
item.description: 劳埃德银行集团周四表示，正在调查导致客户能在网上查看彼此交易记录的技术故障原因。这是英国银行在拥抱数字化服务过程中遭遇的一系列技术问题中的最新一起。【原文：Lloyds Banking Group said on Thursday it was investigating ​the causes of a glitch ‌that allowed customers to see each other's transactions online, the latest in a ​series of technical problems for ​UK banks embracing digital services.】

item.title: 欧盟敦促美国将其视为解决产能过剩的盟友，而非问题根源
item.description: 欧盟委员会周四表示，美国政府启动对欧盟及其他15个贸易伙伴的不公平贸易行为调查后，美国应将欧盟视为应对制造业产能过剩的合作伙伴，而非问题的根源。【原文：The United States should view the European ​Union as a partner in ‌the fight against manufacturing overcapacity rather than a cause of the ​problem, the European Commission ​said on Thursday after the ⁠U.S. administration launched investigations into ​unfair trade practices of the bloc ​and 15 other trading partners.】

item.title: 德意志银行强调私人信贷风险，因其投资组合规模持续扩大
item.description: 德意志银行周四表示，其私人信贷组合在2025年增长约6%，达到近260亿欧元（300.5亿美元），同时该行也强调了这个备受瞩目领域面临的风险。【原文：Deutsche Bank said on Thursday that its private credit portfolio grew around ​6% to nearly 26 billion euros ($30.05 ‌billion) in 2025 as it highlighted risks to the headline-grabbing sector.】

item.title: 印度计划推出新激励措施促进手机生产，利好苹果、三星
item.description: 印度计划在本月其旗舰手机产业扶持计划到期后，推出新的本土手机生产激励措施，两位消息人士透露，此举将提振苹果和三星等全球企业。【原文：India is planning fresh incentives for local production of mobile phones after its flagship program for the burgeoning ​sector expires this month, two sources said, in a ‌boost for global firms like Apple and Samsung .】

item.title: Dollar General预测年度销售额低于预期
item.description: 周四，美元商店集团预测全年可比销售额将低于华尔街预期，因在经济不确定性加剧的背景下，寻求优惠的顾客正转向其他折扣商店和线上零售商以获取更优惠的价格。【原文：Dollar General forecast annual ‌comparable sales below Wall Street estimates on Thursday, as bargain-hunting customers turn to ​other discount stores and online ​retailers for better deals amid economic ⁠uncertainty.】

item.title: 软银旗下PayPay筹集8.8亿美元后，即将登陆备受期待的纳斯达克市场
item.description: 软银旗下PayPay将于周四晚些时候在纳斯达克交易所开始交易，此前这家日本支付应用在备受瞩目的美国首次公开募股中筹集了约8.8亿美元。【原文：SoftBank's PayPay will begin trading on the Nasdaq later on Thursday, after the Japanese payments app raised about $880 million in its hotly anticipated U.S. initial ​public offering.】

item.title: 摩根大通限制向私营信贷公司放贷，彭博新闻报道
item.description: 据彭博社周三报道，摩根大通已限制向私募信贷公司放贷，此前该行对其投资组合中某些贷款的估值进行了下调。【原文：JPMorgan Chase has restricted lending ​to private credit firms after marking down ‌the value of certain loans in their ​portfolios, Bloomberg ​News reported on Wednesday.】

item.title: 消息人士称中国将铁矿石禁令扩大至必和必拓新产品
item.description: 中国已连续两周扩大对必和必拓铁矿石的禁令，加剧了与全球第三大钢铁原料供应商长达数月的合约纠纷。【原文：China has widened a ban on BHP iron ore for the second time in two weeks, ​escalating a months-long contract dispute with the world's third-largest ‌supplier of the key steelmaking ingredient.】

item.title: 早盘报价：原油价格突破三位数
item.description: 当今美国及全球市场中真正重要的因素【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: Bumble股价因财报超预期及人工智能驱动的应用程序改造计划而上涨
item.description: 周四盘前交易中，Bumble股价飙升25%，因其超预期的第四季度业绩以及针对约会应用的人工智能改造计划——旨在重新吸引年轻用户——重新点燃了投资者的乐观情绪。【原文：Bumble shares surged 25% in premarket trading on Thursday, as stronger‑than‑expected fourth‑quarter results and an AI‑focused overhaul of its dating app ​aimed at winning back younger users reignited investor optimism.】

item.title: 芯片制造设备供应商KLA宣布70亿美元股票回购计划
item.description: 芯片制造设备供应商KLA公司周四宣布启动一项价值70亿美元的股票回购计划，该计划将补充其现有股票回购授权额度——截至2025年12月31日，该授权额度为39.4亿美元。【原文：Chipmaking tool ​provider KLA Corp ‌on Thursday ​announced ​a share buyback ⁠program ​worth $7 billion, ​in addition to ​its ​existing share repurchase ‌authorization, ⁠which stood at $3.94 billion ​as ​of ⁠December ​31, 2025.】

item.title: 美国参议员沃伦就亚马逊与地方政府及学校的合同签订及定价行为施压
item.description: 据路透社获得的一封信函显示，马萨诸塞州联邦参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦要求亚马逊首席执行官安迪·贾兹就该公司采购平台的算法定价和合同签订实践提供详细信息。此前有倡导团体指出，部分学校和地方政府采购办公用品的成本高于邻近地区的其他机构。【原文：U.S Senator Elizabeth Warren of Massachusetts is asking Amazon CEO Andy Jazzy to provide details on its ​algorithmic pricing and contracting practices for the company's procurement ‌platform after an advocacy group said some schools and local governments paid more for office supplies compared to others in nearby locations, according to ​a letter seen by Reuters.】

item.title: 以色列网络安全公司Onyx Security完成4000万美元融资后正式启动运营
item.description: 以色列网络安全公司Onyx Security周四正式启动运营，此前该公司已获得4000万美元的初始融资，这表明尽管美以两国正对伊朗展开战争，投资者对以色列科技领域的兴趣依然持续。【原文：Israeli cyber firm Onyx Security officially launched operations on Thursday after securing $40 million in initial funding, ​signalling continued investor interest in the country's technology sector ‌despite the ongoing U.S.-Israeli war on Iran.】

item.title: 美国保险公司和医院借助新型人工智能技术，在收费与支付的古老博弈中寻求新突破
item.description: 在美国医疗体系与保险公司之间的拉锯战中，双方都开始运用人工智能技术——医疗体系希望为医疗程序获得更高报酬，而保险公司则要求证明这些服务确有必要。专家们难以预测这场较量谁将胜出。【原文：Artificial intelligence is being deployed on both sides of the tug-of-war between U.S. healthcare systems that want to be paid more for ​medical procedures and insurers who want proof the services were necessary, and experts are having a hard time predicting a winner.】

item.title: 巴西工业规模可可种植园的梦想在价格暴跌后逐渐破灭
item.description: 巴西可可种植者已紧急叫停新种植项目，此前可可价格从2024年创下的历史高点暴跌70%，这使得该国可可产量增长陷入停滞——而投资者原本预期该国将成为巧克力主要原料的重要供应国。【原文：Cocoa farmers in Brazil have slammed the brakes on new planting projects following a 70% plunge in cocoa prices from their 2024 record high, stalling growth that investors had expected would make the country a ​major supplier of the main ingredient in chocolate.】

item.title: 软件公司反击对人工智能将取代它们的担忧
item.description: 甲骨文公司首席执行官迈克·西西利亚近日就人工智能工具是否会导致其所在行业消亡的争论发表了看法。他对此给出了明确的否定答案。【原文：Oracle's Mike Sicilia is the latest software CEO to wade in to the debate on whether artificial intelligence tools that heavily automate human tasks will mean the demise of his industry. His verdict was a resounding "no."】

item.title: 华尔街内部人士助金融机构规避伊朗冲突风险
item.description: 在2月28日周六美以联军空袭击毙伊朗最高领袖的前一天，许多华尔街公司已预见到军事行动的发生——这得益于日益壮大的退役军人和国家安全顾问群体，他们警告称相关迹象已十分明显。【原文：The day before U.S.-Israeli air strikes killed Iran's Supreme Leader on Saturday February 28, many Wall Street firms were expecting military action thanks to a ​growing industry of ex-military and national security advisors who were warning the signs were clear.】

item.title: 谷歌将伦敦办公室命名为"37号站台"，既呼应毗邻的火车站，也暗喻人工智能围棋对弈
item.description: 谷歌将其伦敦新总部命名为"37号站台"，以此致敬毗邻的国王十字火车站，同时呼应DeepMind人工智能系统AlphaGo在围棋传奇对决中对阵世界冠军李世乭时所下的关键棋步"37手"。【原文：Google has named its new London headquarters "Platform 37" in a nod to its neighbour, King's Cross ​railway station, and "Move 37" - a pivotal play made ‌by DeepMind's AI system AlphaGo in a legendary match of the ancient boardgame Go against world champion Lee Sae Dol.】

item.title: 欧盟高级议员称美国必须在关税调查中遵守欧盟-美国协议
item.description: 欧洲议会贸易委员会主席周四表示，欧盟只应接受那些实质上重现去年双方在苏格兰达成的协议内容的新一轮美国关税措施。【原文：The European Union should only accept new U.S. ​tariffs that recreate the ‌substance of the deal agreed between the two sides in Scotland ​last year, the chair of ​the European Parliament's trade committee ⁠said on Thursday.】

item.title: 礼来公司发现其减肥药复方制剂存在杂质，警告存在健康风险
item.description: 礼来公司周四发布公开信称，含有维生素B12和礼来公司Zepbound主要成分的复合减肥药，因制备过程中产生一种此前未被识别的杂质，可能对消费者构成健康风险。【原文：Compounded weight-loss drugs that contain vitamin B12 and the main ingredient in Eli Lilly's ‌Zepbound could present health risks to consumers due to a previously unidentified impurity caused in the preparation, the U.S. drugmaker said in a public letter released on Thursday.】

item.title: 国际能源署称中东战争将导致全球面临史上最大石油供应中断
item.description: 国际能源署周四表示，中东战争正造成全球石油市场史上最大的供应中断。此前一天，该机构同意从战略储备中释放创纪录数量的石油。【原文：The war in the Middle East ​is creating the biggest ‌oil supply disruption in the history of the global ​market, the International ​Energy Agency said on Thursday, ⁠a day after the ​agency agreed to release ​a record volume of oil from strategic stockpiles.】
